name: Ultimate Card Pack
description: Standard S.H.I.E.L.D. tactical recruitment nodes. Provides a balance of classic and tactical reinforcements.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Elite Node
description: High-priority classification recruitments. Enhanced chances to unlock Super Rare and Legendary tactical assets.

name: S.H.I.E.L.D. Rally Pack
description: Recruit squad assets using co-op Rally Points earned from proposing and receiving rallies from fellow agents.
